description: Metadata-only Safetensors header gate passes through a COMMITTED, reproducible production path (scripts/q35q_header_gate.py + src/q35q_header_gate_adapter.py + tests), repairing the range-provenance/reproducibility defects. Aggregate-only: counts, booleans, public architecture shapes; no tensor names, URLs, OIDs, response headers, caches, or local paths.

defects_addressed.defect_1_wildcard_or_absent_total: verify_range_response now requires a present positive-integer total equal to a positive-integer declared size; wildcard '*'/None/boolean/zero/negative sizes fail closed
defects_addressed.defect_2_oid_identity: each shard's immutable lfs sha256 OID is frozen from public metadata into the descriptor (narrowed claim: descriptor identity, NOT payload cryptographic verification via header bytes)
defects_addressed.defect_3_exact_descriptor: request URL is bound to the exact {repo_id, revision, path} of the frozen descriptor by equality, not a /resolve/<hex>/ substring; wrong repo / wrong revision / wrong path fail closed
defects_addressed.defect_4_observable_transport: http_get contract returns (status, headers, body, final_url); the final URL is observed and rejected on HTTPS downgrade; the claim is narrowed to what is actually verified
defects_addressed.defect_5_committed_reproducible_adapter: run_header_gate composes frozen descriptors -> descriptor-bound fetcher -> format-hardened parser -> index reconciliation; the same code is used in tests and the committed live CLI
defects_addressed.defect_6_adversarial_coverage: tests fail closed on wildcard total, bad declared sizes, wrong-but-valid-shaped repo/revision/path/OID, non-HTTPS final URL, descriptor<->index set mismatch, three-tuple transport, and a descriptor size disagreeing with the response (self-binding impossible: descriptors frozen before transport)

permitted_claim: immutable Hub metadata + exact descriptor binding + exact ranged-response provenance (206/exact-range/exact-total) + valid Safetensors header format + index/header reconciliation. Ranged header bytes do NOT cryptographically verify shard payloads.
other_open_phase0_gates: packed(source)<->numbered(artifact) expert representation map + source<->index module-set equality
one production-path final conjunction with self-binding/provenance failure tests
weight staging (still prohibited before a genuine overall pass)
privacy: aggregate-only; no tensor names, URLs, OIDs, response headers, weights, caches, or local paths
